parameters.query:
SELECT o.id, o.opp_title, o.agency, o.naics_code, o.estimated_value, o.stage, o.gda_label,
  cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage' as gate_stage,
  cp.plan_data->>'teaming_partner' as current_partner
FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
LEFT JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON cp.opp_id = o.id
WHERE o.gda_label = 'PURSUE'
ORDER BY o.gda_score DESC LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO gda_teaming_partners (
  company_name, uei, cage, teaming_score, recommendation,
  naics_codes, set_asides, score_breakdown, best_matches,
  scored_by, scored_at
) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, $10, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (uei) DO UPDATE SET
  teaming_score = EXCLUDED.teaming_score,
  recommendation = EXCLUDED.recommendation,
  score_breakdown = EXCLUDED.score_breakdown,
  best_matches = EXCLUDED.best_matches,
  scored_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;
SELECT company_name, uei, cage, teaming_score, recommendation, set_asides, best_matches, scored_at FROM gda_teaming_partners ORDER BY teaming_score DESC LIMIT 50;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_teaming_partners (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  company_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  uei VARCHAR(12) UNIQUE,
  cage VARCHAR(10),
  teaming_score INTEGER,
  recommendation VARCHAR(30),
  naics_codes JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  set_asides JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  score_breakdown JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  best_matches JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  scored_by TEXT,
  scored_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_team_score ON gda_teaming_partners(teaming_score DESC);
SELECT 'gda_teaming_partners ready' AS status;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({error: 'Invalid action. Use: score, list, setup'}) }}
